steps.title: Identify the antecedent and required form
steps.content: The blank requires a possessive pronoun referring to the singular antecedent The Eiteljorg Museum.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: pronoun-antecedent agreement. Rule: a possessive pronoun must match its antecedent in number and must not be confused with a contraction.
  • Choice A — "their": plural possessive; disagrees with singular "The Eiteljorg Museum." ✗
  • Choice B — "it's": contraction of "it is," not a possessive; grammatically wrong here. ✗
  • Choice C — "his": masculine possessive; a museum has no gender, so this is inappropriate. ✗
  • Choice D — "its": singular, gender-neutral possessive; correctly refers to the singular museum. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
